SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.model.mode

Class LeaderboardEntry

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.model.mode.LeaderboardEntry
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<LeaderboardEntry>
public class LeaderboardEntry extends Object implements Comparable<LeaderboardEntry>
Immutable leaderboard entry with score, statistics, and timestamp (Value Object Pattern). Comparable by score in descending order for ranking.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    LeaderboardEntry(int score, int linesCleared, long playTimeMs, int level)
    Creates a leaderboard entry with current timestamp.
    LeaderboardEntry(int score, int linesCleared, long playTimeMs, int level, String timestamp)
    Creates entry from stored data (for loading from persistence).

  • Constructor Details

    • LeaderboardEntry

      public LeaderboardEntry(int score, int linesCleared, long playTimeMs, int level)
      Creates a leaderboard entry with current timestamp.
      Parameters:
      score - Final score
      linesCleared - Lines cleared
      playTimeMs - Play time in ms
      level - Level reached

    • LeaderboardEntry

      public LeaderboardEntry(int score, int linesCleared, long playTimeMs, int level, String timestamp)
      Creates entry from stored data (for loading from persistence).
      Parameters:
      score - Score
      linesCleared - Lines cleared
      playTimeMs - Play time
      level - Level
      timestamp - Timestamp string

  • Method Details

    • getScore

      public int getScore()
      Gets the final score achieved in this game session.
      Returns:
      the score value

    • getLinesCleared

      public int getLinesCleared()
      Gets the total number of lines cleared in this game session.
      Returns:
      the lines cleared count

    • getPlayTimeMs

      public long getPlayTimeMs()
      Gets the total play time in milliseconds.
      Returns:
      play time in milliseconds

    • getTimestamp

      public String getTimestamp()
      Gets the timestamp when this entry was created.
      Returns:
      timestamp string in format "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"

    • getLevel

      public int getLevel()
      Gets the level reached in this game session.
      Returns:
      the level number (0 for endless mode)

    • getFormattedPlayTime

      public String getFormattedPlayTime()
      Gets formatted play time as MM:SS.
      Returns:
      formatted time string (e.g., "05:23")

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(LeaderboardEntry other)
      Compares entries by score in descending order. Higher scores rank first in the leaderboard.
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<LeaderboardEntry>
      Parameters:
      other - the entry to compare with
      Returns:
      negative if this score is higher, positive if lower, 0 if equal
